channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Three migrants convicted for gang rape of woman on Brighton beach
item.description: Three asylum seekers have been convicted of gang raping a woman on Brighton beach in October 2025. Iranian-born Abdulla Ahmadi, 26, and Egyptians Karin Al-Danasurt, 20, and Ibrahim Alshafe, 25, attack...

item.title: Maimane challenges ANC over dismissal with legal action
item.description: Douglas Maimane, the recently dismissed mayor of Madibeng, has served the ANC with a lawyer's letter demanding an explanation for his removal. The ANC's secretary-general, Fikile Mbalula, confirmed th...

item.title: Inquiry report shows 518 deaths and widespread injuries after Tanzania’s 2025 election unrest
item.description: A Commission of Inquiry into the violence that followed Tanzania’s October 29, 2025 elections has confirmed that 518 people lost their lives, with most deaths caused by gunshot wounds. The findings we...

item.title: US envoy suggests Italy as potential replacement for Iran at 2026 World Cup
item.description: A senior US envoy, Paolo Zampolli, has proposed that Italy replace Iran at the 2026 FIFA World Cup following growing geopolitical tensions surrounding Iran's participation. Zampolli, a special envoy t...

item.title: UP Board 2026 Results and Top Rank Holders List for Class 10 and 12
item.description: The requested news article could not be accessed due to an “Access Denied” error from the server, which indicates that the content is restricted or unavailable for retrieval. However, based on the URL...

item.title: Government Announces Measures After October 29 Election Violence
item.description: President Samia Suluhu Hassan, on Thursday, explained six immediate steps the government go implement after the October 29, 2025 events. One of the main actions is to set up a special criminal investi...

item.title: PPP Criticizes Government’s Park Plan at Margalla Hills Foothills
item.description: The Pakistan People’s Party (PPP) has strongly opposed a proposed park project planned by the government at the foothills of the Margalla Hills, a protected area in Islamabad. According to a press rel...

item.title: Three Dead, Three Injured in Police Operation Gone Wrong in Zamboanga
item.description: A police operation in Barangay Sinunuc, Zamboanga City, turned deadly early on April 21, 2026, when three villagers were killed and three others were injured during a botched law-enforcement mission. ...

item.title: Florida executes inmate convicted of 1990 neighbor's murder, marking the state's fifth execution in 2026
item.description: Florida has carried out its fifth execution of the year, putting to death a death-row inmate convicted of killing a neighbor in 1990. The execution reflects the state's continued use of capital punish...

item.title: Pakistan strongly denies Indian allegations linking it to Pahalgam attack on its first anniversary
item.description: Pakistan has firmly rejected fresh Indian attempts to link it with the deadly Pahalgam attack of April 22, 2025, in which 26 people, mostly tourists, were killed in the disputed Himalayan region of Ka...

item.title: NDMA Issues Nationwide Advisory on Severe Heatwave and Weather Disturbances
item.description: The National Disaster Management Authority (NDMA) has issued a nationwide alert warning of an intense heatwave affecting various regions in Pakistan until May 5. The advisory highlights that Sindh, so...

item.title: Darma outlines plan to tackle Nigeria housing deficit and improve sector governance
item.description: Ministerial nominee Muttagha Darma don promise say him go work closely with the National Assembly to tackle Nigeria serious housing problem. As he dey speak during him Senate screening for Abuja, Darm...

item.title: ABS-CBN introduces new drama ‘The Chambermaid’s Daughter’ starring Alexa Ilacad and Gelo Rivera
item.description: ABS-CBN has announced the launch of its first-ever vertical drama, 'The Chambermaid’s Daughter', starring Alexa Ilacad and Gelo Rivera. The series marks a fresh venture for the network as it dives int...

item.title: Taiwan minister visits disputed Itu Aba island amid South China Sea tensions
item.description: A Taiwanese government minister has made a rare visit to Itu Aba, also known as Taiping Island, a disputed feature in the South China Sea, during a period of heightened regional tensions. Ocean Affair...

item.title: Curnow leads Swans to dominant win over Bulldogs as injuries pile up
item.description: The Western Bulldogs faced a crushing 66-point defeat to the Sydney Swans at Marvel Stadium on Thursday night, with star recruit Charlie Curnow booting seven goals. The Bulldogs, already reeling from ...

item.title: Congress Chief Kharge Criticises PM Modi for Not Responding to Trump's Remarks on India
item.description: New Delhi: Congress President Mallikarjun Kharge strongly criticised Prime Minister Narendra Modi after US President Donald Trump reportedly referred to India using a derogatory term. Kharge questione...

item.title: Federal Government introduces public policy–private partnership model to boost economic growth
item.description: The Federal Government of Nigeria don introduce a new approach to economic management wey go give private sector stronger role in shaping and executing policies. According to Taiwo Oyedele, Minister o...

item.title: Toronto prepares for FIFA World Cup as 50-day countdown begins
item.description: The article focuses on Toronto entering the final stretch of preparations as the FIFA World Cup approaches, marking roughly 50 days until the city is expected to be closely engaged with the global tou...

item.title: Kate and William share rare family moment with heartwarming video of Prince Louis on his 8th birthday
item.description: The Prince and Princess of Wales have given royal fans a rare peek into their family life by sharing an adorable video of their youngest son, Prince Louis, celebrating his 8th birthday during a recent...

item.title: Virginia Republicans Regret Limited Spending in Failed Redistricting Defense
item.description: Virginia Republicans are expressing deep frustration following a narrow loss in a special referendum on April 21, 2026, that allows Democrats to redraw the state's congressional districts. The vote, w...
